O

OccupancyDTO - Class in common.dto
Immutable data transfer object describing the live occupancy of a single park.
OccupancyDTO(int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
Creates a fully populated occupancy snapshot.
occupancySub - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Occupancy sub-line ("(N free)").
occupancyValue - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Live occupancy value ("current / limit").
offerGrabToNext(int, String) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Offers a freed slot to the next waiting visitor.
offerSub - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
Local-only piggyback on the shell's notification subscription (see class javadoc).
oldPriceCents - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO
The reservation's price before the edit, in cents.
oldValue - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
The park's value for that field when the request was made.
onBook() - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Book-button handler: validates the form and sends CREATE_RESERVATION.
onCasual() - Method in class client.view.GateController
Casual-entry handler: admits a walk-in via CASUAL_VISIT and shows the ticket.
onCasualExit() - Method in class client.view.GateController
Closes a casual walk-in by the ticket number issued at admission.
onClientConnected(String, String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
 
onClientConnected(String, String) - Method in interface server.net.ServerListener
Called when a client establishes a connection.
onClientDisconnected(String, String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
 
onClientDisconnected(String, String) - Method in interface server.net.ServerListener
Called when a client's connection is closed or lost.
onConnectionChanged(boolean) - Method in interface client.service.NetworkService.ConnectionListener
Invoked when the connection's reachability may have changed.
onEnter() - Method in class client.view.GateController
Entry handler: validates the code + visitor id and admits via ENTER_VISIT.
onError(String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
 
onError(String) - Method in interface server.net.ServerListener
Called to report a failure that should stand out in the operator's log.
onExit() - Method in class client.view.GateController
Exit handler: records an exit by confirmation code or visitor id.
onGenerate() - Method in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Generate-button handler: validates inputs and runs REPORT_CANCELLATIONS.
onGenerate() - Method in class client.view.VisitsReportController
Generate-button handler: validates inputs and runs REPORT_VISITS_BY_TYPE.
onHide() - Method in class client.view.BaseController
Called by Navigator just before this screen is swapped out.
onHideHook() - Method in class client.view.BaseController
Overridable template for additional cleanup beyond unsubscribing.
onHideHook() - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
 
onLoad() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Load-button handler: parses the entered visitor id and loads their list.
onLog(String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
 
onLog(String) - Method in interface server.net.ServerListener
Called to report a normal activity message for the operator's log.
onLogout - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Callback run on logout (returns to the login screen).
onLogout() - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
Logout-button handler: tells the server to release the lock, then logs out.
onNotificationEvent(ServerEvent) - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
Handles a pushed notification event (already marshalled onto the FX thread by EventBus).
onRefresh() - Method in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Refresh-button handler: reloads the pending queue.
onRefresh() - Method in class client.view.GateController
Refresh-button handler: repaints the occupancy header.
onRefresh() - Method in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Refresh-button handler: reloads the notifications.
onRefresh() - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Refresh-button handler: reloads the waiting list.
onRegister() - Method in class client.view.GuideRegisterController
Register-button handler: validates the form and sends REGISTER_GUIDE.
onRegister() - Method in class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
Register-button handler: validates the form and sends REGISTER_SUBSCRIBER.
onReservationEvent(ServerEvent) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Reacts to a pushed reservation change.
onReservationEvent(ServerEvent) - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Reacts to a pushed reservation change by reloading the list.
onScreenChange - Variable in class client.app.Navigator
Callback invoked with the new screen after each navigation.
onScreenChange(Navigator.Screen) - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
Updates the topbar title/subtitle when the active screen changes.
onShow() - Method in class client.view.BaseController
Called by Navigator after a fresh screen has been loaded and its dependencies wired.
onShow() - Method in class client.view.GateController
Refresh the occupancy header when the screen becomes active.
onStarted(int) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
 
onStarted(int) - Method in interface server.net.ServerListener
Called once the server has bound and begun accepting connections.
onStopped() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
 
onStopped() - Method in interface server.net.ServerListener
Called once the server has stopped accepting connections and shut down.
onSubmit() - Method in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Submit handler: validates the new value and sends REQUEST_PARAM_CHANGE.
onSubmit() - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
Submit handler: connects if needed, then submits the active credential set.
onSuccess - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Callback run on successful login (opens the main shell).
op - Variable in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Which lifecycle transition occurred.
orDash(String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Renders a blank/null field as an em dash so empty values read cleanly.
OrderServer - Class in server.net
The TCP server: accepts client connections on a port, spawns a handler thread per client that reads ClientRequests in a loop and dispatches them through a RequestRouter, and runs the SchedulerService timed jobs for its lifetime.
OrderServer(int, ServerListener) - Constructor for class server.net.OrderServer
Creates a server bound to a port and reporting to a listener.
original - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
The reservation being edited (the original, pre-change values).
out - Variable in class client.net.ClientConnection
Object output stream (writes are serialized on its monitor).
out - Variable in class server.net.ClientSession
Object output stream for writing responses/events.
